patch.value: Complete schema customization epic (pm-8jdc): remove-type, add-status, per-type workflows, config create_default_type

Close the remaining gaps in the schema/config universal-customization epic so any project archetype can model and govern its own domain. Scope: (1) pm schema remove-type [pm-k8ik]; (2) pm schema add-status/remove-status [pm-e77a]; (3) per-type workflow allowed-transitions enforced on update [pm-f4r1]; (4) governance.create_default_type settable via pm config set [pm-jpwo]; plus close satisfied stories pm-mt7k (schema list/show) and pm-vhd9 (init --type-preset). Delivered via 2 specialized sub-agents on branch schema-customization-completion-20260603, integrated/verified/changelog-regenerated by orchestrator.

Schema customization epic completion delivered: closed pm-k8ik (remove-type), pm-e77a (add-status/remove-status), pm-f4r1 (per-type workflows), pm-jpwo (config create_default_type), and satisfied stories pm-mt7k/pm-vhd9. Implemented via 2 specialized sub-agents on branch schema-customization-completion-20260603; full coverage gate green (2195 tests, 100%); static gate green; smoke-tested end-to-end.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: COMPLETION RECORD (kept open intentionally): all scoped work delivered & closed — pm-k8ik (remove-type), pm-e77a (add-status/remove-status), pm-f4r1 (per-type workflows), pm-jpwo (config create_default_type), pm-mt7k + pm-vhd9 (satisfied stories). Full coverage gate green (2195 tests, 100%), static gate green, smoke-tested end-to-end. Left in 'open' status (not closed) so this coordination Plan stays OUT of the closed-items CHANGELOG (pm-changelog buckets only closed items; a Plan is an organizational container, not a shippable change). Tracked under epic pm-8jdc.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: PR opened: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/pull/106 (branch schema-customization-completion-20260603, commit 3f7f9867). Triggered @codex / @gemini-code-assist / CodeRabbit review. Awaiting CI + 20-min AI bot review window.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Review round 1 addressed (commit a9b38d74): fixed status add-status data-loss (roles/aliases preserved unless explicitly set), per-type-workflow explicit-empty deny-all (the file-load normalizer was stripping it), non-finite --order rejection (CLI+MCP), clearable governance-create-default-type, gated orphan-removal warnings, settings-reuse perf, defensive guards. Skipped 4 with reasons (auto-gen CHANGELOG bucket, dead-code spread guard, correct docs link, too-invasive contract narrowing). Full coverage gate 2203 tests/100%, static green. Re-triggered @codex/@gemini-code-assist/CodeRabbit; awaiting round-2.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: MERGED: PR #106 merged to main 2026-06-03 (merge commit 5c055d69). All 6 schema-epic items closed (pm-k8ik/e77a/f4r1/jpwo + stories pm-mt7k/vhd9). Converged after 6 AI-review rounds: Codex clean x3 (rounds 4-6), Gemini 'no review comments' (round 6), CodeRabbit clean; all CI green; coverage 100%. 8 real review findings fixed (2 data-loss bugs, deny-all semantics, lifecycle-token shadowing, add-status TOCTOU, built-in-id override, malformed-workflow drop, post-update-type, NaN/fractional order, config clear, perf, defensive guards). 1 pre-existing cross-cutting bug deferred + tracked as pm-haak. Telemetry stack healthy/real-time (16.1k events/24h); Sentry has no new issues from this PR. Daily auto-release will cut the next version from the non-empty CHANGELOG [Unreleased].

value.author: codex-zw0n

patch.value: Schema-customization completion plan fully delivered (remove-type pm-k8ik, add-status pm-e77a, per-type workflows pm-f4r1, create_default_type pm-jpwo all closed via PR #106). Closing stale-open done plan; forward schema work continues under pm-8jdc.

author: maintainer-agent
message: Revert prior close: keep open to avoid changelog classifier mis-routing the plan title ('remove-type' substring) into the Removed section; stale-done-plan cleanup is out of scope for this backlog-rebuild PR.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Status audit 2026-06-26 (claude-code-agent): every sub-item of this completion Plan is now closed/shipped — pm-k8ik (remove-type), pm-e77a (add-status), pm-f4r1 (per-type workflows), pm-jpwo (config create_default_type), pm-mt7k (schema list/show), pm-vhd9 (init --type-preset). This Plan is functionally complete and is a candidate for a dedicated governance-close pass (kept open here to avoid mixing a release-changelog regeneration trigger into an unrelated code PR, per pm-j8z6's bundling guidance).

patch.value: All four schema-customization gaps shipped (remove-type, add/remove-status, per-type workflows, create_default_type config); satisfied stories closed; epic pm-8jdc acceptance satisfied.

## Plan record
Delivery plan for completing the schema-customization epic (pm-8jdc), executed 2026-06-03 on branch schema-customization-completion-20260603 via 2 specialized sub-agents, integrated and verified by the orchestrator.

Steps (all shipped):
1. pm schema remove-type [pm-k8ik — closed]
2. pm schema add-status / remove-status [pm-e77a — closed]
3. Per-type workflow allowed-transitions enforced on update [pm-f4r1 — closed]
4. governance.create_default_type settable via pm config set [pm-jpwo — closed]
5. Close satisfied stories pm-mt7k (schema list/show), pm-vhd9 (init --type-preset) [closed]

## Why still open / exit criteria
Retained as the epic's verification checklist. Before closing: re-verify each referenced child is closed with resolution evidence, confirm docs (SCHEMA.md/CONFIGURATION.md) cover all five capabilities, then materialize the outcome into a closing comment on pm-8jdc. The epic itself stays open as a living backlog.
